name: test_deregister
description:
Deregister stake address.

        * submit registration certificate and delegate to pool
        * attempt to deregister the stake address - deregistration is expected to fail
          because there are rewards in the stake address
        * withdraw rewards to payment address
        * deregister stake address
        * check that the key deposit was returned
        * check that the stake address is no longer delegated
descriptionHtml:
Deregister stake address.

    * submit registration certificate and delegate to pool
    * attempt to deregister the stake address - deregistration is expected to fail
      because there are rewards in the stake address
    * withdraw rewards to payment address
    * deregister stake address
    * check that the key deposit was returned
    * check that the stake address is no longer delegated

labels.name: tag
labels.value: @pytest.mark.skipif(False, reason='supposed to run on cluster with pools')

tags: @pytest.mark.skipif(False, reason='supposed to run on cluster with pools')
